title: Tool use 生命周期：定义、调用、执行、返回
title_en: Tool Use Lifecycle: Define, Call, Execute, Return

body.concept: Tool use 遵循四步循环。(1) 定义：你用 JSON Schema 描述工具（名称、参数、描述），放在 API 请求里发送。(2) 调用：Claude 分析用户请求，决定调用哪个工具，返回包含结构化参数的 tool_use block。(3) 执行：你的应用运行实际代码（client tool），或 Anthropic 运行它（server tool）。(4) 返回：工具结果作为 tool_result 消息发回，Claude 据此生成最终回答。这个循环可以重复——Claude 可能连续调用多个工具后才回答。
body.analogy: 像医生（Claude）开化验单（tool_use）。医生决定做什么检查，但从不亲自抽血——实验室（你的应用）执行检查并返回结果。医生再根据结果给出诊断建议。

body_en.concept: Tool use follows a four-step cycle. (1) Define: you describe tools via JSON Schema (name, parameters, description) and send them in the API request. (2) Call: Claude analyzes the user's request and decides which tool(s) to call, returning tool_use blocks with structured arguments. (3) Execute: your application runs the actual code (for client tools) or Anthropic runs it (for server tools). (4) Return: the tool result is sent back as a tool_result message, and Claude uses it to produce its final answer. This cycle can repeat — Claude may chain multiple tool calls before answering.
body_en.analogy: Like a doctor (Claude) writing a lab order (tool_use). The doctor decides what tests to run but never draws blood — the lab (your app) runs the test and sends results back. The doctor then interprets the results and advises the patient.

diagram:
flowchart LR
    A([You]) --> B[tools + user message]
    B --> C[Claude]
    C --> D[tool_use block]
    D --> E[Your app executes]
    E --> F[tool_result]
    F --> C
    C --> G{More calls needed?}
    G -->|yes| D
    G -->|no| H[final answer]
